|-----|------|------|
| NetworkInterfaceService/AttachToInstance | (AttachNetworkInterfaceRequest) → operation.Operation | POST /vpc/v1/networkInterfaces/{network_interface_id}:attach |
| NetworkInterfaceService/Create | (CreateNetworkInterfaceRequest) → operation.Operation | POST /vpc/v1/networkInterfaces |
| NetworkInterfaceService/Delete | (DeleteNetworkInterfaceRequest) → operation.Operation | DELETE /vpc/v1/networkInterfaces/{network_interface_id} |
| NetworkInterfaceService/DetachFromInstance | (DetachNetworkInterfaceRequest) → operation.Operation | POST /vpc/v1/networkInterfaces/{network_interface_id}:detach |
| NetworkInterfaceService/Get | (GetNetworkInterfaceRequest) → NetworkInterface | GET /vpc/v1/networkInterfaces/{network_interface_id} |
| NetworkInterfaceService/List | (ListNetworkInterfacesRequest) → ListNetworkInterfacesResponse | GET /vpc/v1/networkInterfaces |
| NetworkInterfaceService/ListOperations | (ListNetworkInterfaceOperationsRequest) → ListNetworkInterfaceOperationsResponse | GET /vpc/v1/networkInterfaces/{network_interface_id}/operations |
| NetworkInterfaceService/Update | (UpdateNetworkInterfaceRequest) → operation.Operation | PATCH /vpc/v1/networkInterfaces/{network_interface_id} |
